has.title: Tesla (or multiple) for Bay Area Land or Real Estate
has.story: I'm offering a Tesla, or multiple Teslas, with a combined value between $30K-$150K. I'm looking to trade for buildable land or other real estate.

has.title: Levi's and Union Bay Jeans
has.story: I have three pairs of very comfortable, clean used jeans (two Levi's, one Union Bay) in various sizes that I'm looking to trade. These are probably worth $20-$40 per pair.

wants.why: One pound per pair of jeans (total 3 lbs for all 3 pairs).

want_embs.why: One pound per pair of jeans (total 3 lbs for all 3 pairs).

has.title: 2005 Toyota Camry LE
has.story: I am the second owner of this 2005 Toyota Camry LE. It runs great, has new tires, and many new parts, but it needs a catalytic converter.

has.story: I am the second owner of this 2005 Toyota Camry LE with 250k miles. It runs great, is good on gas, has new alternator, starter, radiator, transmission filter and oil, and new tires. AC works great and it has a clean pink slip.
